title: mimosa somnians var. deminuta
intro: Mimosa somnians var. deminuta, also known as the small sensitive plant, is a variety of the Mimosa somnians plant that is native to South America and is characterized by its small size and sensitive leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Mimosa somnians var. deminuta have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Mimosa somnians var. deminuta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
